name: cc-edge-gemini-antigravity
author: VisiCore Tech - CriblPacks@VisiCoreTech.com
description: Cribl Edge Pack that collects documented Google Antigravity CLI configuration, plugin metadata, agent brain markdown, shared MCP configuration, and global rules from the local filesystem, then forwards them to a Cribl Stream worker group for indexing, analysis, and search. Candidate app, IDE, runtime log, history, annotation, code-tracker, legacy Gemini CLI, and OTLP sources remain available but disabled by default. Each data source gets a unique datatype metadata value for downstream sourcetype mapping.
displayName: Antigravity CLI & IDE Pack For Edge
